,{"comment":{"comment_id":"7175153704914780943","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《大宋:娱乐圈第一男明星》的作者来捧场，兄弟文笔细腻，叙事娓娓道来，不足之处和我的差不多——节奏慢，这点在番茄🍅很要命，我是为爱发电，咬牙要把第一本写完。大家互勉吧，会天天来追都的，加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670595733,"group_id":"7168677941574896672","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"努力为您写出好看的故事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3P0Mi3Cc6iMV8gGgkil3EAPN+Sdvab409LkxlAYZFwR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/951e391bcf714ad6997c82cf4487db33~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790702&x-signature=8iHm2deA%2BuMCu5ZYSXUoEy4AXto%3D","user_id":"1289098452800296","user_name":"五月的天空"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1289098452800296","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1713897630,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7168677941574896672","book_info":{"abstract":"第一篇写得节奏有点慢，不好修改，慢慢看过去就好！
